meeting_title: Fort Worth City Council Day Meeting
location: Fort Worth City Council Chamber, 100 Fort Worth Trail, Fort Worth, Texas

primary_source.document_title: CITY COUNCIL AGENDA FOR THE MEETING AT 10:00 AM, TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 30, 2025

verbatim_notes: Every agenda item title, M&C number, Council District reference, dollar amount, zoning case number, and procedural bracket heading in this excerpt is quoted verbatim from the official Fort Worth agenda PDF. No content is paraphrased, summarized, or reconstructed from secondary sources.

trimmed_content: Procedural headers (Invocation, Pledges of Allegiance), Special Presentations (Recognition for World Homeless Day, Recognition for Donald Boren), consent agenda items not selected for this excerpt, board appointment procedural items, and full adjournment boilerplate language were omitted. Selected agenda items are preserved in their original order of appearance on the official agenda.

meridian_demo_relevance.deferral_pattern: Present - M&C 25-0866 is explicitly marked (Continued from a Previous Meeting) and appears alongside M&C 25-0866 (REVISED) on the same agenda
meridian_demo_relevance.multi_department_authority: Present - Stormwater/Water/TPW/Atmos franchise coordination (M&C 25-0933), Water/Texas Water Development Board coordination (M&C 25-0918), Zoning Commission to Council escalation (ZC-25-131)
meridian_demo_relevance.corridor_scenario_alignment: Strong - CD 5 has both Atmos gas relocation (multi-utility corridor coordination) and emergency sewer repair at Hart/IH-820 (emergency excavation with cross-infrastructure impact)
governance_hold_candidates: ZC-25-131 site plan required as unresolved condition
